'''鈭歜-ch-k''' ('''bachaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbend|unbend]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbend|unbend]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-ch-k
|-
! Lemma
| bachaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bachakithi|bachakithi]] || [[word:bachakiji|bachakiji]] || [[word:bachakishi|bachakishi]] || [[word:bachaki|bachaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bachakuthuth|bachakuthuth]] || [[word:bachakujuj|bachakujuj]] || [[word:bachakushush|bachakushush]] || [[word:bachak|bachak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bachakuthu|bachakuthu]] || [[word:bachakuju|bachakuju]] || [[word:bachakushu|bachakushu]] || [[word:bachaku|bachaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bachakufuth|bachakufuth]] || [[word:bachakufuj|bachakufuj]] || [[word:bachakufush|bachakufush]] || [[word:bachakuf|bachakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bachakethe|bachakethe]] || [[word:bachakeje|bachakeje]] || [[word:bachakeshe|bachakeshe]] || [[word:bachake|bachake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bachakothoth|bachakothoth]] || [[word:bachakojoj|bachakojoj]] || [[word:bachakoshosh|bachakoshosh]] || [[word:bachak|bachak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bachakotho|bachakotho]] || [[word:bachakojo|bachakojo]] || [[word:bachakosho|bachakosho]] || [[word:bachako|bachako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bachakofoth|bachakofoth]] || [[word:bachakofoj|bachakofoj]] || [[word:bachakofosh|bachakofosh]] || [[word:bachakof|bachakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bachak忙th忙|bachak忙th忙]] || [[word:bachak忙j忙|bachak忙j忙]] || [[word:bachak忙sh忙|bachak忙sh忙]] || [[word:bachak忙|bachak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bachakathath|bachakathath]] || [[word:bachakajaj|bachakajaj]] || [[word:bachakashash|bachakashash]] || [[word:bachak|bachak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bachakatha|bachakatha]] || [[word:bachakaja|bachakaja]] || [[word:bachakasha|bachakasha]] || [[word:bachaka|bachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bachakafath|bachakafath]] || [[word:bachakafaj|bachakafaj]] || [[word:bachakafash|bachakafash]] || [[word:bachakaf|bachakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:bachakasha|bachakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobachakasha|gobachakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibachakasha|gokibachakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:bachakn眉sha|bachakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobachaknkn眉sha|gobachaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibachakn眉sha|gokibachakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bachaksh毛sha|bachaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobachaknksh毛sha|gobachaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibachaksh毛sha|gokibachaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bachakrosha|bachakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobachaknkrosha|gobachaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibachakrosha|gokibachakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bachakmusha|bachakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobachaknkmusha|gobachaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibachakmusha|gokibachakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:bachaksherasha|bachaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobachaknksherasha|gobachaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibachaksherasha|gokibachaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:bachakngasha|bachakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobachaknkngasha|gobachaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibachakngasha|gokibachakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bachakyasha|bachakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobachaknkyasha|gobachaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibachakyasha|gokibachakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:bachakyamasha|bachakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobachaknkyamasha|gobachaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibachakyamasha|gokibachakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:bachakn眉sh毛sha|bachakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobachaknkn眉sh毛sha|gobachaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibachakn眉sh毛sha|gokibachakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bachakn眉rosha|bachakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobachaknkn眉rosha|gobachaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibachakn眉rosha|gokibachakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bachakn眉musha|bachakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobachaknkn眉musha|gobachaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibachakn眉musha|gokibachakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:bachaksh毛n眉sha|bachaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobachaknksh毛n眉sha|gobachaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibachaksh毛n眉sha|gokibachaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bachaksh毛rosha|bachaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobachaknksh毛rosha|gobachaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibachaksh毛rosha|gokibachaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bachaksh毛musha|bachaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobachaknksh毛musha|gobachaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibachaksh毛musha|gokibachaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:bachakron眉sha|bachakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobachaknkron眉sha|gobachaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibachakron眉sha|gokibachakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:bachakrosh毛sha|bachakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobachaknkrosh毛sha|gobachaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibachakrosh毛sha|gokibachakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bachakromusha|bachakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobachaknkromusha|gobachaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibachakromusha|gokibachakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:bachakmun眉sha|bachakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobachaknkmun眉sha|gobachaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibachakmun眉sha|gokibachakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:bachakmush毛sha|bachakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobachaknkmush毛sha|gobachaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibachakmush毛sha|gokibachakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bachakmurosha|bachakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobachaknkmurosha|gobachaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibachakmurosha|gokibachakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:bachak|bachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:b忙ch忙k|b忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobachak|hobachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hob忙ch忙k|hob忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobachak|hohobachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohob忙ch忙k|hohob忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉bachak|n眉bachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉b忙ch忙k|n眉b忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉bachak|n眉n眉bachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉b忙ch忙k|n眉n眉b忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂bachak|n茂bachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂b忙ch忙k|n茂b忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂bachak|n茂n茂bachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂b忙ch忙k|n茂n茂b忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubachak|lubachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lub忙ch忙k|lub忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubachak|lulubachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulub忙ch忙k|lulub忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libachak|libachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lib忙ch忙k|lib忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibachak|lilibachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilib忙ch忙k|lilib忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobachak|kobachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kob忙ch忙k|kob忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobachak|kokobachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokob忙ch忙k|kokob忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebachak|kebachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keb忙ch忙k|keb忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebachak|kekebachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeb忙ch忙k|kekeb忙ch忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
